name: Fukanya, Arranged Marriage
description: I used google to search up Egyptian names, and use like the 3rd name bc it was my favorite one. This isn’t accurate to culture or nothing, this is just for fun😁 My best friend Daug got me this picture, it’s so good, just look. I just wanted to make it into a bot. But still, There’s a fucking JanAiS bot that was made, I know it’s a site for bots that got taken down, But I’m glad it’s taken down! Lazy ass nigga’s don’t deserve good pictures, it had 2 fuckin sentences. 😐😡😱🤯 But here I cook with actual time and effort, for all of my ‼️71‼️ FOLLOWERS💪😎
creator: Breadmaster
